name: Reduced-Fat Macaroni & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare macaroni as label directs but do not add salt to water; drain.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Spray a shallow, broiler-safe, 2 1/2-quart casserole with nonstick cooking spray.
4. In a food processor with the knife blade attached, blend cottage cheese until smooth. (Alternatively, blend cottage cheese with 1/4 cup of the milk called for in the recipe for easier blending.)
5. In a 2-quart saucepan, mix flour with 1/4 cup milk until smooth. Slowly stir in the remaining milk until blended. Cook over medium heat until the mixture just boils and thickens slightly, stirring frequently.
6. Remove the saucepan from heat; stir in cottage cheese, cheddar, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
7. Place macaroni in the casserole; cover with cheese sauce.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
9. Remove the casserole from the oven. Turn the oven control to broil.
10. Sprinkle parmesan cheese on top of the macaroni mixture.
11. Place the casserole in the broiler at the closest position to the heat source; broil 2 to 3 minutes until the top is golden brown.
